plan: Query.set_empty() (django/db/models/sql/query.py) only adds a NothingNode to self.where, but for combined queries (union/intersection/difference) the compiler builds SQL from combined_queries and ignores the outer WHERE, so QuerySet.none() has no effect. Fix set_empty() to also clear the combinator state (set combined_queries = () and combinator = None) so the emptied query compiles to an empty result. This makes ModelMultipleChoiceField's queryset.none() call in django/forms/models.py behave correctly for union() querysets without changing forms code.
